text.title: Performance Domains Overview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Performance Domains Overview artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing project_id + assessor; only 1 of 8 domains scored; score missing evidence; remediations missing for low scores; partial report.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
